risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to mixed materials (Al 7075 and CFRP).
risk.mit: Conduct thermal cycling tests to validate material compatibility.

risk.desc: Standoff alignment may be compromised if tolerance is not maintained during manufacturing.
risk.mit: Implement tighter tolerances and regular quality checks.

risk.desc: Deployer rail clearance might be insufficient if manufacturing variations occur.
risk.mit: Include a small margin of error in the design and perform clearance checks.

risk.desc: Service access could be obstructed if the inspection window is not properly aligned.
risk.mit: Ensure accurate placement of the inspection window during assembly.

risk.desc: Fastener pattern may not provide adequate preload if torques are not correctly applied.
risk.mit: Specify torque values and train assembly personnel on proper application techniques.
